name: Output
description: Workflow output/endpoint. Marks the end of a workflow path.
doc:
Mark the completion of a workflow path.

Usage:
• Connect the final result value
• Label describes what this output represents
• Multiple outputs can exist in one flow

When to Use:
• End of main workflow path
• After conditional branches converge
• When subflow results need to be captured

Tip: Descriptive labels help understand workflow results at a glance.
